message.content:
Kumusta, Maria! I got you back!

15 minutes is better than nothing, and you can do something to get your blood pumping without needing any equipment at all. How about a quick bodyweight routine? I can guide you through some simple exercises to get you moving and prepare you for a more energetic study session later.

Try this:

1. Warm-up: Jumping jacks (30 seconds)
2. Squats: 10 reps
3. Push-ups: 10 reps (modify on your knees if needed)
4. Plank: 30-second hold
5. Mountain climbers: 30 seconds
6. Wall sit: 30 seconds
7. Cool-down: Static stretch (30 seconds each leg and back)

Feel free to rest when needed, but try to keep moving. Remember to breathe and listen to your body.

How's that sound? You in?
